name: darwin_libgcc_s_1

name: darwin_flto_unknown

name: darwin_icu_76_undefined

name: darwin_codesign_missing
fix_hint: add darwin.sigtool to nativeBuildInputs (or disable installCheck on darwin if the tests still fail past codesign)

name: darwin_nasm_elf_macho
fix_hint: pass --disable-asm on darwin (nasm emits ELF by default; build doesn't pass -f macho64)

name: darwin_sysv_shm_sandbox
signature: (Failed to create share|shmop_open with IPC_PRIVATE|Failed to create share at)

name: darwin_sandbox_postPatch_stale
signature: rm: cannot remove '\S+_test\.go': No such file or directory
fix_hint: stale darwin-conditional postPatch refers to files that moved/were deleted upstream — drop the rm lines

name: darwin_patchelf_mach_o
signature: find: 'patchelf': No such file or directory
fix_hint: preFixup uses patchelf (ELF-only); gate on stdenv.hostPlatform.isLinux

name: sqlite_db_locked
